findings.message: push_state_to_ha logs HA 4xx/5xx responses per entity and continues the batch; covered by test_push_state_to_ha_http_error_warns_and_continues.
session_stopped=True forces segment_type off and idle media_player state; covered by test_push_state_to_ha_session_stopped.
push_state_to_ha serializes concurrent pushes with a process-local asyncio lock; stop-after-slow-transition ordering is covered.
Heartbeat task dereferenced — addressed with del pattern and event loop ownership note.
